# Printing Press & Studio — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-printing-press-printing-press-studio
**Vertical slug:** printing-press
**VN-ID:** VN-MED-006
**Niche family:** standalone
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Printing is one of Nigeria's most resilient creative industries. The Nigerian printing market is estimated at ₦200B+ annually. Key demand drivers: political campaign materials (banners, posters, buntings — especially pre-election cycles), church bulletins and programmes (every Nigerian church prints weekly), academic printing (university campuses, WAEC result sheets), corporate identity (letterheads, branded merchandise, business cards), and event programmes. Major printing clusters: Computer Village Ikeja (Lagos), Onitsha Printing District (Anambra), Zaria Road (Kaduna), Ikeja Way (Abuja). Typical services: digital printing (Ricoh, HP DesignJet), offset printing (Heidelberg, Komori), large format (banners, flexboards), and binding. APCON (Advertising Practitioners Council of Nigeria) licence required for advertising agencies; not directly required for print studios but relevant for campaign material printers.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Pastor Samuel Adeyemi, Church Admin, Lagos** — Prints 500 weekly bulletins and 2,000 seasonal programmes per year. Wants affordable fast-turnaround printing.
- **APC Ward Coordinator, Abuja** — Needs 5,000 branded campaign banners and flyers for a gubernatorial campaign. Time-sensitive.
- **Bola Okafor, University Student Union, Ibadan** — Needs 300 printed certificates and 50 backdrop banners for an SUG cultural night.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Studio branding, print services hero, WhatsApp order CTA, price list download, turnaround times
- **About**: Equipment, years in business, CAC registration, APCON membership (if applicable)
- **Services**: Full product catalogue with NGN prices (business cards, flyers, banners, calendars, etc.), minimum orders, turnaround times
- **Contact**: WhatsApp order line, artwork upload instructions, pick-up/delivery info, Paystack payment, NDPR form

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Fast, reliable, quality-focused. Nigerian print buyers care about price, turnaround, and colour accuracy. Taglines: "Print Right. Print Fast. Print Nigerian", "From Artwork to Delivery — Same Day Available". Primary CTA: "Order via WhatsApp". Secondary CTA: "Download Price List". AVOID: long descriptions; print buyers want prices fast.

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- CAC business registration
- APCON membership (if offering advertising services)
- Equipment list (Heidelberg press, Ricoh digital, HP DesignJet — shows capability)
- Turnaround time guarantee
- Customer testimonials (churches, corporates, politicians — Nigerian clients)
- Sample work portfolio images
- Paystack/bank transfer for orders

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. Large Heidelberg offset press running in a busy Nigerian printing hall — workers in aprons
2. Printing operator pulling a freshly printed Nigerian political campaign poster off a large-format machine
3. Stack of professionally printed church bulletins with a Nigerian church branding cover
4. Close-up of full-colour business cards being cut on a guillotine machine
5. Delivery of printed materials to a Nigerian market trader — boxes of branded packaging
6. Customer reviewing a printed banner proof with a print studio rep — smiling, outdoor
7. Computer Village or Onitsha printing district exterior — shopfront with banners and samples displayed

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- CAC business registration number
- APCON membership (if advertising/agency services offered)
- Copyright compliance notice (no printing of unlicensed copyrighted content)
- INEC Electoral Act 2022: campaign material must not contain voter inducement
- NDPR for customer artwork and data files
- Environmental compliance: ink/chemical disposal

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- WhatsApp order CTA on home + contact ✅
- All prices in NGN ✅
- Nigerian contexts (churches, campaigns, campuses) ✅
- Nigerian client names in testimonials ✅
- CAC/APCON trust signals ✅
- Paystack/bank transfer ✅
- 375px mobile responsive ✅
- esc() on all user strings ✅
- NDPR consent on enquiry/order form ✅
